creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
Valgrind 3.17 is out so git head has now moved to 3.18. This bumps up the version number to follow that.

commit c9d1cd0db3a806ee0b2e91f59261d6caf791ffee upstream switched a lot of files from the lib directory to libexec, so there are a lot of changes in pkg-plist to reflect that.
